registeredUsers.note: Cumulative NHS App registered users in England

digitalBookings.note: Proportion of GP appointments booked digitally (online or via NHS App)

digitalExclusion.note: Estimated percentage of population unable to access online health services (digital exclusion)

sources.name: Good Things Foundation / Lloyds Bank
sources.dataset: UK Consumer Digital Index — digital exclusion estimates

metadata.methodology: NHS App registered users from NHS Digital performance dashboard. Digital booking percentage calculated from NHS appointment data comparing online/app vs. phone/walk-in booking methods. Digital exclusion estimates from Lloyds Bank UK Consumer Digital Index and Good Things Foundation Essential Digital Skills framework.
knownIssues: Registered users includes accounts created but not actively used
Digital booking definition varies — some systems count repeat prescription requests as digital appointments
Digital exclusion estimates are modelled and subject to considerable uncertainty
